rules.Dakka: Each unmodified roll of a 6 To Hit causes one additional Auto Hit. ‘Ere We Go! – This model may reroll failed Charge rolls.
rules.Mob Rule: 12” True Aura, friendly units may treat their Ld equal to the number of models in this unit.
rules.Poor Maintenance: In each of your Command Phases, roll a d6 for each unit with this rule in your army. On a 1, the unit must decide if it will Move or Shoot this turn. If elected to Move, it may Advance and Fall Back this turn but cannot Shoot or Charge. If elected to Shoot, it may Shoot in the Shooting Phase, but cannot Move, Advance, Charge, or Fall Back. High Altitude models MUST always move, and can never opt to Shoot instead of Move because of Poor Maintenance.

rules.name: Posh Lifestyle
rules.description: Models in your army may not claim Objective Markers in the enemy deployment zone.

rules.name: Wealthiest Gitz
rules.description: Models in your army trigger Dakka on a 5+ instead of a 6+ To Hit.

rules.name: Sneaky Gitz
rules.description: Models in your army gain Stealth and Outflank. If they already have Stealth they gain Shroud.

rules.name: Survivors of Da Big Party
rules.description: Models in your army must reroll successful Ld tests.

rules.name: Grot Warmachines
rules.description: All Vehicle, Titanic Vehicle, Monsters, and Titanic Monsters with the Ork keyword suffer W-2 but gain BS-1 (Improves by 1).

rules.name: Only Grots
rules.description: This army may not include any Ork keyword units that are not Vehicle, Titanic Vehicle, Monsters, or Titanic Monsters.

rules.name: Hurry Up and Loot
rules.description: All models in your army must declare Charges if they can legally do so, and may not do anything such as fire Heavy Weapons or Advance if it would compromise a legal Charge that is in range.

rules.name: Scavenging Gitz
rules.description: Each unit in your army gains one Looted Die for each W# of each model it slays. Looted Dice may be used to reroll any To Hit die in relation to this unit, but you cannot reroll a reroll.

rules.name: Hyper ADHD Gitz
rules.description: Infantry models in your army only count as half a model for purposes of contesting an Objective Marker.

rules.name: Speed Freeks
rules.description: All Vehicles gain M+2. Aircraft may turn 90 degrees after firing in the Shooting Phase as well as before moving in the Movement Phase.

rules.name: Pirate Gitz
rules.description: All Infantry models in your army gain Objective Secured.

rules.name: Lurking Pirates
rules.description: Your entire army must deploy in Reserves, even if it is normally not allowed to do so.

rules.name: Goff is Da Best
rules.description: All models in your army may reroll 1s To Hit in Melee.

rules.name: Obnoxious Gitz
rules.description: Infantry models in your army only count as half a model for purposes of contesting an Objective Marker.

rules.name: Feral Gitz
rules.description: This army may not field any Vehicle models, but all models gain M+2.

rules.name: Tough Squiggitz
rules.description: Infantry, Monstrous Infantry, Monsters, and Titanic Monsters inflict a 2 To Wound on Poisoned (#+) weapons rolling To Wound them.

rules.name: Poisonous Fauna
rules.description: All Squig keyword models in your army gains Poisoned (3+) on its Melee weapons.
